scene_summary: A dark, worn scan-field plate with sparse torn apertures, tiny colored stamps, pinholes, teal thread scratches, paper scars, and one large lower cover-stock rupture carrying the dominant source evidence.
usable_surfaces: center pinhole and teal thread seam

detected_objects.label: hero mixtape archive aperture
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Large ragged lower tear with exposed yellow, cyan, pink, black, and white printed cover fragments; torn silvered edge and abraded paper lip define a real aperture.

detected_objects.label: hero anchor cover scar
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Upper-right ragged opening exposes a rubbed yellow-and-cyan image fragment under cracked dark paper, with bright torn rim and irregular triangular contour.

detected_objects.label: public-domain paper window
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Off-white torn paper corner at the top right, mottled with black speckles and sharply folded against the dark scan field.

detected_objects.label: patchwork lineage glint
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Faint teal node-and-thread scratch runs from the central pinhole down toward black nodes and across toward the right edge, visible as a thin cyan lineage line.

detected_objects.label: Layered Fragment
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Lower-right layered paper patch with tan, black, gray, and purple fragments, including a tilted gray flap over a darker rectangular base.

detected_objects.label: Distributed Marker
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Dense constellation of small black punctures and worn pale rims to the right of the hero aperture, forming a distributed source-bearing scar field.

detected_objects.label: patchwork lineage glint
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Planned source surface fallback used because plate inspection returned fewer mapped objects than source bindings.

detected_objects.label: Layered Fragment
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Planned source surface fallback used because plate inspection returned fewer mapped objects than source bindings.

detected_objects.label: Distributed Marker
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Planned source surface fallback used because plate inspection returned fewer mapped objects than source bindings.

complexity_assessment.rationale: The plate is mostly negative dark scan field; interaction anchors are sparse and physically legible, led by two torn apertures plus small stamps, pinholes, and thread gestures rather than clutter.

mapping_note: Package assembly filled unmapped source pockets from planned artifact surfaces because plate inspection returned too few detected objects.
